center.name: Inkachaka
center.summary: Inkachaka是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括鳞辉尾蜂鸟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: malagae is found in the vicinity of Inkachaka in central Bolivia's Cochabamba Department

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: malagae is found in the vicinity of Inkachaka in central Bolivia's Cochabamba Department
